testcase.name: SignInWithGoogle action > redirects to Google OAuth URL on success
SignInWithGoogle action > redirects to the homepage with error when Supabase returns an error
SignOutWithGoogle action > redirects to the homepage on success
SignOutWithGoogle action > renders error message when Supabase returns an error
Proxy — User is NOT authenticated > redirects to / when accessing a protected route
Proxy — User is NOT authenticated > redirects to / when accessing a deeply nested protected route
Proxy — User is NOT authenticated > allows access to / (public route)
Proxy — User is NOT authenticated > allows access to /about (public route)
Proxy — User is NOT authenticated > allows access to /about/team (public sub-path)
Proxy — User IS authenticated > redirects to /dashboard when accessing /
Proxy — User IS authenticated > allows access to /dashboard
Proxy — User IS authenticated > allows access to a protected nested route
Proxy — route matcher work correctly (/product as public) > redirects to / when accessing /products
Proxy — route matcher work correctly (/product as public) > redirects to / when accessing /products/about/product-id
GET /api/auth > no code in params > redirects to homepage with error
GET /api/auth > code exchange fails > redirects to homepage with error
GET /api/auth > code exchange succeeds > redirects to / by default in local env
GET /api/auth > code exchange succeeds > redirects to ?next= path in local env
GET /api/auth > code exchange succeeds > ignores non-relative next param and redirects to /
GET /api/auth > code exchange succeeds > uses x-forwarded-host in production
GET /api/auth > code exchange succeeds > falls back to origin when no x-forwarded-host in production
